page: Amazon Web Services c7gd.12xlarge is a compute-optimized instance powered by 48 dedicated physical cores of the ARM64 AWS Neoverse-V1 processor running at 2.6 GHz. It features 96.0 GB of system memory, providing a 2.0 GB per core ratio. The instance is equipped with 2850 GB of local NVMe SSD storage and delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 22 Gbps, managed via the AWS Nitro hypervisor.

Benchmark data shows strong multi-core performance, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 73467.4 and a Geekbench multi-core score of 19220.0. Memory performance is highly competitive, achieving a top-tier PassMark memory score of 3145.85 and uncached read bandwidth of 274.85 GB/sec. The instance also demonstrates strong capabilities in database operations, registering 31361.16 on PassMark database tests and 76.38 million operations per second in Redis SET benchmarks.

While multi-core and memory bandwidth metrics are strong, single-core performance remains in the average tier, with a Geekbench single-core score of 1518.0. Additionally, text generation for small LLM models is relatively weak at 56.09 tokens per second, though medium model text generation is strong. Given the combination of high-density ARM compute, fast local NVMe storage, and high memory bandwidth, this instance is well-suited for high-throughput database workloads, software compilation, static web serving, and multi-threaded data processing.
description: Amazon Web Services c7gd.12xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 48 dedicated physical ARM64 cores powered by AWS Neoverse-V1 processors at 2.6 GHz. It is configured with 96.0 GB of memory, 2850 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, and a 22 Gbps baseline network interface. Benchmarks indicate top-tier memory performance and strong multi-core capabilities, highlighted by a PassMark memory score of 3145.85 and a stress-ng multi-core score of 73467.4. The instance excels in database operations and software compilation, though single-core performance and small-model LLM text generation represent relative performance tradeoffs. It is highly suitable for multi-threaded workloads, high-throughput databases, and static web serving.
og_description: Amazon Web Services c7gd.12xlarge is an ARM64 compute-optimized instance with 48 physical cores, 96 GB RAM, and 2850 GB NVMe SSD storage, delivering strong multi-core and database performance.

tagline: An ARM64 compute-optimized platform featuring high-speed local NVMe storage and strong multi-core performance for database and multi-threaded workloads.
bullet_points: 48 dedicated ARM64 AWS Neoverse-V1 physical cores running at 2.6 GHz.
96.0 GB of system memory paired with 2850 GB of local NVMe SSD storage.
Top-tier memory performance and strong multi-core benchmark results.
22 Gbps baseline network bandwidth managed by the AWS Nitro hypervisor.
Optimized for high-throughput database operations, Redis, and software compilation.
